title: Gareb #1619
definition:
Gareb = "scabby"

 n pr m
 1) one of the heroes of David's army

 n pr loc
 2) a hill near Jerusalem, apparently southwest
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gareb = "scabby"

 n pr m
 1) one of the heroes of David's army

 n pr loc
 2) a hill near Jerusalem, apparently southwest

    NASB:  one of Davids heroes, also a hill near Jer.
